## Summary

Describe the change and the reason for it.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run verify:commit`
- [ ] `npm run verify:push`
- [ ] `npm run test:backend:integration` if backend behavior changed

## Architecture

- [ ] Reviewed against `docs/architecture-guide.md`
- [ ] No new avoidable structural drift introduced across route/service/repository or page/service boundaries
- [ ] React Query and service-layer patterns preserved for frontend server state

## Docs

- [ ] README or `docs/` updated when behavior or setup changed

## Notes

Add rollout notes, follow-up work, or reviewer context if needed.
